<!-- Thanks for contributing! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (manifest / ABI / CLI flag rename)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / refactor / tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes (if TS packages touched).
- [ ] `./scripts/e2e.sh` passes (if CLI touched).
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/` and/or `README.md`).
- [ ] For manifest/ABI changes: RFC discussion linked below and `APIVersion`
      bumped if breaking.

## Related issues / RFCs

Closes #
